case_title: TIFFANY BAKER VS. DESOTO CAB COMPANY LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100065335)

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAKER, TIFFANY AS TO DEFENDANT DESOTO CAB COMPANY LLC DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-12-2018 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-07-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-19-2018
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST TIFFANY BAKER FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: FEB-26-2019, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAR-13-2019. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-26-2019 CONTINUED TO APR-30-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-30-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-12-2018 CONTINUED TO JAN-23-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-26-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JAN-23-2019 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100067286) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAKER, TIFFANY ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 5.0 DAYS
MINI MINUTES FOR FEB-26-2019 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
